message:
feat: Import system improvements + allocator analysis + list mutation

Agent 1 & 3: Import system fixes
- Fixed build directory creation
- Fixed module file copying
- Local imports now work (10/10 tests)

Agent 2: Deep work on type system
- Function allocator scope analysis (241 lines)
- List mutation analysis (272 lines)
- Enables smart const/var decisions

Result: 78/134 tests passing (58%)

Note: 2 files exceed 500 lines (assign.zig: 524, generators.zig: 527)
Will split in next commit
